title: Dockrillia nugentii
taxonomy: Dockrillia nugentii is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is endemic to Queensland in Australia. The classification of Dockrillia nugentii is within the subtribe Aeridinae. Further classification places it in the genus Dockrillia and the tribe Epidendroideae. The precise classification of Dockrillia nugentii is as follows: Dockrillia nugentii (Fitzg.) D.L.Jones & M.A.Clem., Orchidaceae.
